functional.name: Phi_int_general
functional.definition: general intelligence as constrained path-system viability and extensibility
functional.formal: Phi_int_general = GM(Phi_cap, Phi_stab, Phi_read, Phi_reason, Phi_proto, Phi_align, Phi_survival, Phi_general)

verdict.core_answer: Intelligence should now be defined more generally as the system's ability to form, preserve, transport, extend, align, and recover viable reasoning paths under admissible constraints.
